name: FctsCaseMgtStatusExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH source_data AS (SELECT DISTINCT CMCM_ID,CMST_SEQ_NO,USUS_ID,CMST_STS,CMST_STS_DTM,CMST_MCTR_REAS,CMST_USID_ROUTE,CMST_LOCK_TOKEN,ATXR_SOURCE_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_CMST_STATUS WHERE CMST_STS_DTM >= '@{pipeline().parameters.LastRunDt}'),transform AS (SELECT STRIP.FIELD.EE(CMCM_ID) + ';' + CAST(CMST_SEQ_NO AS VARCHAR(10)) + ';' + dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}) AS PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING,@{pipeline().parameters.RunIDTimeStamp} AS FIRST_RECYC_TS,STRIP.FIELD.EE(CMCM_ID) AS CASE_MGT_ID,CMST_SEQ_NO AS CASE_MGT_STTUS_SEQ_NO,dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}) AS SRC_SYS_CD,STRIP.FIELD.EE(dbo.trim_default(USUS_ID)) AS USUS_ID,STRIP.FIELD.EE(dbo.trim_default(CMST_STS)) AS CMST_STS,CMST_STS_DTM AS CMST_STS_DTM,STRIP.FIELD.EE(dbo.trim_default(CMST_MCTR_REAS)) AS CMST_MCTR_REAS,STRIP.FIELD.EE(dbo.trim_default(CMST_USID_ROUTE)) AS CMST_USID_ROUTE FROM source_data) SELECT PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING,FIRST_RECYC_TS,CASE_MGT_ID,CASE_MGT_STTUS_SEQ_NO,SRC_SYS_CD,USUS_ID,CMST_STS,CMST_STS_DTM,CMST_MCTR_REAS,CMST_USID_ROUTE FROM transform

Description:
Called By: FctsMedMgtCntl


Process : Extract Case Mgt Status data from Facets to DataSet which is processed and loaded to CASE_MGT_STTUS table
